title: EPL build manifest
description: Records resolved versions and SHA256 hashes for every artifact built during a lab session, so two students building on the same day get reproducible artifacts.

role.description: Which firmware contract this manifest describes.

imagebuilder_image.description: Docker image used for the build (digest preferred).

package_list_sha256.description: SHA256 of the resolved opkg package list (sorted, newline-delimited).

image_sha256.description: SHA256 of the produced sysupgrade .bin (drop-mango) or rootfs tarball (engagement-platform).

image_size_bytes.description: Size of the produced image in bytes.

source_date_epoch.description: SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH used for the build (for reproducible squashfs timestamps).

builder_host.description: Hostname of the machine that produced the build (audit only).
